---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar >}}  Google Scholar" 
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E1HI8OoAAAAJ
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/zeng_tong
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/tong-zeng/
sidebar: false
page-navigation: false
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .page-navigation {display: none;}
</style>
```
Greetings! 你好！My name is Tong Zeng. ![](images/greetings.gif){width="48"}

I am current study in the M.S. in Computer Science Program at Virginia Tech, working with Professor Dawei Zhou in the [VT Learning on Graphs (VLOG) Lab](https://sites.google.com/view/dawei-zhou/vlog-lab). My research interest lies in the intersection of pre-trained large language models and knowledge graphs. Please visit my [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=E1HI8OoAAAAJ) profile for some of my publications.
